failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matches even though the tool returned two matching products above the requested minimum price.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The tool call at index 3 correctly returned two matching items, priced $272.33 and $237.48, both above $233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator reinforced the same incorrect reading.
